mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM sys_share WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT CONCAT('sh_', s.id) as id, uf.file_name as name, u.username as owner, DATE_FORMAT(s.share_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as shareTime, DATE_FORMAT(s.expire_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as expires, f.file_size as size, CASE WHEN uf.is_dir = '1' THEN 'folder' ELSE 'doc' -- 这里可以根据后缀名写更复杂的 CASE END as type FROM sys_share s JOIN sys_user_file uf ON s.user_file_id = uf.id JOIN sys_user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_file f ON uf.file_id = f.id WHERE s.status = 0 AND (s.expire_time IS NULL OR s.expire_time > NOW())
AND uf.file_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY s.share_time DESC
SELECT uf.* FROM sys_share s JOIN sys_user_file uf ON s.user_file_id = uf.id WHERE s.id = #{shareId} AND s.status = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_share (user_file_id, user_id, share_code, share_time, expire_time, status) VALUES (#{userFileId}, #{userId}, #{shareCode}, NOW(), #{expireTime}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT('f_', uf.id) AS id, uf.file_name AS name, CASE WHEN uf.is_dir = '1' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isDir, f.file_size AS size, CASE WHEN uf.is_dir = '1' THEN 'folder' ELSE 'doc' END AS type, DATE_FORMAT(uf.update_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updateTime FROM sys_share s JOIN sys_user_file uf ON s.user_file_id = uf.id LEFT JOIN sys_file f ON uf.file_id = f.id WHERE s.share_code = #{shareCode} AND s.status = 0 AND (s.expire_time IS NULL OR s.expire_time > NOW()) AND uf.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY s.share_time DESC
SELECT expire_time FROM sys_share WHERE share_code = #{shareCode} AND status = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT uf.* FROM sys_share s JOIN sys_user_file uf ON s.user_file_id = uf.id WHERE s.share_code = #{shareCode} AND uf.id = #{fileId} AND s.status = 0 AND (s.expire_time IS NULL OR s.expire_time > NOW()) AND uf.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT uf.* FROM sys_share s JOIN sys_user_file uf ON s.user_file_id = uf.id WHERE s.share_code = #{shareCode} AND s.status = 0 AND (s.expire_time IS NULL OR s.expire_time > NOW()) AND uf.is_deleted = 0
